round1BlockingIssues.issue: API surface gap: resolved tuning config not exposed in status response
round1BlockingIssues.resolution: Commit 23b3959 added ultraPlanTuning and groundedSearchTuning fields to DiscoveryRunStatusPayload and buildCompletedRunStatus(). Service restart required to pick up code changes.
